title: Service Manager Boot and Initialization
interaction_flow: ServiceManager → ServiceManager: init internal structures (services_l_, services_m_, waiting_, init_listeners_)
ServiceManager → ServiceManager: await setTimeout(0)  [yield to event loop]
ServiceManager → factory (Service class): factory.create({ parameters, context })
Service.create → Service: new this()  [constructor calls FeatureBase → installs FEATURES]
ServiceManager → ServiceManager: push entry { name, instance, status:'registering' }
ServiceManager → ServiceManager: get_waiting_for_(depends)  [check which deps are not Running]
ServiceManager → ServiceManager: status = 'pending'; add to waiting_[dependency] set
ServiceManager → TService trait: service_impl = entry.instance.as(TService); service_impl.init()
TService.init → Service: run init_hooks[] (e.g. ServiceFeature hooks subscribe to topics)
LaunchOnInitService._init → LaunchOnInitService: for each command → this.run_(command)
ServiceManager → ServiceManager: entry.status = 'running'; entry.statusStartTS = new Date()
ServiceManager → ServiceManager: for each dependent in waiting_[name] → maybe_init_(dependent)  [cascade]
ServiceManager → init_listeners_[]: notify all waiting aget() callers
Caller → services_l_: for each service → instance.construct({ gui_params: options })
Caller → services_l_: for each service → instance.init({ services: globalThis.services })
key_relationships: AdvancedBase extends FeatureBase — installs NodeModuleDIFeature, PropertiesFeature, TraitsFeature, TopicsFeature
Service (putility concepts) extends AdvancedBase — installs ServiceFeature
Service (gui definitions.js) extends concepts.Service — adds $puter context, overrides construct/init
ServiceManager depends_on TService trait (Symbol) to call get_depends(), init(), construct()
ServiceFeature installs init_hooks: subscribes HOOKS entries to dependency topic events
TService trait is resolved via AdvancedBase TraitsFeature (as() method)

dependency_resolution.trigger: When init_service_ sets status=running it iterates waiting_[name] and calls maybe_init_ on each dependent
dependency_resolution.async_wait: wait_for_init(deps) + aget(name) use init_listeners_ callback array to block until deps are Running

important_notes: Two parallel service systems: putility ServiceManager (backend/general) and GUI-specific launch_services() in initgui.js
GUI launch_services does NOT use ServiceManager — it maintains its own services_l_ / services_m_ and calls construct() then init() sequentially on all services
putility ServiceManager supports async dependency-ordered init; GUI version is simpler: sequential register then two-phase construct+init loops
LaunchOnInitService runs after init, reading gui_params.launch_options.on_initialized command list
ServiceFeature (HOOKS) installs cross-service topic subscriptions during init phase, not construct phase
service.as(TService) delegates to the TraitsFeature installed by AdvancedBase
